name: dotmainstudio
description: DotmainStudio personal Claude Code plugins — design workflows, Figma integration, and UI tools

plugins.name: base-connector
plugins.description: Full Relume design-to-code workflow — bridges RELUME-KIT Figma file with the React component library

plugins.name: base-react
plugins.description: Guide for finding and using Relume React + HTML components from the DotmainStudio code library (1072 components)

plugins.name: base-figma
plugins.description: Working guide for the RELUME-KIT Figma file — component catalog, naming conventions, and design tokens

plugins.name: color-scale-generator
plugins.description: Generates a complete 0–100 color scale from any HEX using HSL interpolation, with semantic UI tokens for backgrounds, text, borders and accents
